buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/course-platform run build && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static && cp -r artifacts/course-platform/dist/. .vercel/output/static/ && printf '{"version":3,"routes":[{"src":"/assets/(.*)","dest":"/assets/$1","headers":{"cache-control":"public, max-age=31536000, immutable"}},{"handle":"filesystem"},{"src":"/(.*)","dest":"/index.html"}]}' > .vercel/output/config.json
